prompt: Utfør forenklet årsoppgjør for 2025: 1) Beregn og bokfør årlige avskrivninger for tre eiendeler: Programvare (156100 kr, 6 år lineært, konto 1250), IT-utstyr (168250 kr, 10 år, konto 1210), Kontormaskiner (321800 kr, 6 år, konto 1200). Bruk konto 6010 for avskrivningskostnad og 1209 for akkumulerte avskrivninger. 2) Reverser forskuddsbetalte kostnader (totalt 69150 kr på konto 1700). 3) Beregn og bokfør skattekostnad (22 % av skattbart resultat) på konto 8700/2920. Bokfør hver avskrivning som et eget bilag.

items.reasoning: Norwegian prompt to book annual depreciation for software as part of year-end closing. Amount calculated as 156100 / 6 years.
Norwegian prompt to book annual depreciation for IT equipment as part of year-end closing. Amount calculated as 168250 / 10 years.
Norwegian prompt to book annual depreciation for office machinery as part of year-end closing. Amount calculated as 321800 / 6 years.
Norwegian prompt to reverse prepaid expenses (forskuddsbetalte kostnader) from account 1700 to a general expense account (7790) as part of year-end closing.

Norwegian prompt to book tax expense (skattekostnad) as part of year-end closing. The amount (22% of taxable profit) cannot be calculated as 'skattbart resultat' (taxable profit) was not provided in the prompt. Amount set to 0 as a placeholder.
